description:
AI only creates leverage when it’s applied with strategy, systems, and execution.
If you’re serious about using AI to build or scale a real business (not just experiment with tools), this video is part of a much bigger ecosystem.

This video highlights how often an 'AI gone wrong' scenario stems from not understanding the specific layer where an 'AI fail' occurs, rather than just changing models. AI isn’t one tool. It’s an 8-layer system.
